title: Dante
content:
If you should ask me, whether Dante
    Drank Benedictine or Chianti,
    I should reply, "I cannot say,
    But I can draw him either way."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "Dante", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
